name: Authorization
description: Authorization API connects up providers (for example LDAP) with consumers (for example Organic Groups or Drupal roles).
provides_plugin_types: authorization_provider (@AuthorizationProvider) — Provider plugins in Plugin/authorization/Provider that supply per-user proposals from an external identity source (e.g. LDAP groups)
authorization_consumer (@AuthorizationConsumer) — Consumer plugins in Plugin/authorization/Consumer that grant/revoke a Drupal-side target (e.g. roles) from matched proposals
